title: Croatian Broad Beans Gratin
description: A paleo-friendly, buttery, molten Croatian dish made with broad beans, perfect for a date night dinner.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Blanch the broad beans for 5 minutes, then drain and set aside.
Using a mortar and pestle, pound the garlic cloves until they form a smooth paste.
In a large bowl, combine the softened butter, garlic paste, salt, black pepper, and lemon juice.
Add the blanched broad beans to the bowl and toss to coat with the butter mixture.
Transfer the broad beans to a 20x20cm baking dish and top with grated Parmesan.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the beans are tender.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
